---
title: "Diary of Anna Green Winslow: A Boston School Girl of 1771 ed. Alice Morse Earle"
---

## Diary of Anna Green Winslow: A Boston School Girl of 1771 ed. Alice Morse Earle

**Author:** Anna Green Winslow
**Date:** 1894
**Imprint:** Boston: Houghton Mifflin

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
